headlines.headline: Prynis Systems sees 12% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A double-digit decline in new customer orders indicates a significant deterioration in demand that will likely pressure financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
